system.notes: The non-Trooper's Powered Armor skill (Maximum Metal p.53). Learned by characters who are not Troopers, the same way Streetwise is learned by non-Fixers. It provides the maneuver bonuses of PA Combat Sense (raising the Martial Arts skill usable while operating a suit) but NOT the initiative bonus.

cp2020-augmented.provenance: Maximum Metal p.53 — the non-Trooper's ACPA skill (in place of a special ability, like Streetwise for non-Fixers). Grants PA Combat Sense's maneuver bonuses but not its initiative bonus. Added as a REF skill for the Augmented ACPA rules.
